title: Blink Charging Q3 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Blink Charging Q3 2024 Earnings Summary. Key Metrics. Revenue & Profitability: Total Q3 revenue: $25.2 million (down from $43.4M YoY), Service revenue: $8.8 million, up 30% YoY, Gross margin: 36% (exceeding full-year guidance of 33%), Cash burn: $10.1 million in Q3, down 27% YoY. Operations: 6,978 chargers contracted/sold/deployed in Q3 (up 17% YoY), 6,442 owned-operated chargers (28% growth YoY), 1,278 DC fast chargers across networks, Energy dispersed: 37 gigawatts (up 126% YoY). Financial Position: Cash on hand: $64.6 million, Year-to-date cash burn reduction: $45 million (50% improvement), Operating expenses down 22% YoY. Forward Guidance: Full-Year 2024: Adjusted revenue guidance: $125 million to $135 million, Gross margin target: Approximately 33%, Positive adjusted EBITDA expected in H2 2025. Strategic Priorities: Company plans to shift focus toward higher-margin owner-operated models and reduce personnel by 14% by Q1 2025, targeting $9 million in annualized savings.
